episode.title: EP638 | 🐈‍⬛
episode.summary: 本集股癌由謝孟恭主持，主要內容涵蓋對農曆新年假期個人感受的回顧與近期美股市場的分析。謝孟恭分享了自己如何從過去討厭放假轉變為享受假期的心境，並提到透過玩遊戲重拾童年回憶，體會到「人生就是在打發時間」的哲學。在美股分析方面，他對美國最高法院否決關稅一事提出獨到見解，認為這反而可能增加市場的不確定性，並警惕聽眾注意潛在的區域衝突風險。此外，他還分析了資安股的市場動態，強調冷靜判斷的重要性，並分享了對軟體股和 AI 發展的看法，提醒投資者不要盲目跟風。在聽眾問答環節，他分享了投資心法，強調要相信自己，並隨時保持腦袋的靈活。
keywords: SAST (靜態應用程式安全測試)

recommendations.rationale: Cloudflare focuses on blocking brute-force traffic and will benefit from the API-ification of software, making it unaffected by AI-based SAST tools like Anthropic's Cloud Code Security. Host views market's sell-off of cybersecurity stocks as an overreaction and sees Cloudflare's long-term thesis intact.
recommendations.evidence_quote: 就像我自己喜歡也是長頭的公司，Cloudflare 來說，它的重點是去擋住那些暴力的流量，或者說在之後的 API 取用上面其他都會受惠，所以它其實跟這個 SSD 的故事是不會有什麼衝突的。
recommendations.speaker: 謝孟恭

recommendations.rationale: AXTI is an upstream supplier in the optical communications (光通) space. Host explicitly states it has delivered good returns as part of his optical comms positioning.
recommendations.evidence_quote: 像我最近在壓的東西，像光通，光通就暴漲嘛，像是不管這個 LUMENTAN, COHERENT，或是上游的 AXTI，這個都帶給我很好的報酬，衛星也賺錢。
recommendations.speaker: 謝孟恭

recommendations.rationale: Coherent is part of the host's optical communications (光通) positioning that has been delivering strong returns; named alongside AXTI as a current position giving good returns.
recommendations.evidence_quote: 像我最近在壓的東西，像光通，光通就暴漲嘛，像是不管這個 LUMENTAN, COHERENT，或是上游的 AXTI，這個都帶給我很好的報酬，衛星也賺錢。
recommendations.speaker: 謝孟恭

recommendations.rationale: Lumentum (referred to as 'LUMENTAN' in the transcript) is part of the host's optical communications plays that have been delivering strong returns.
recommendations.evidence_quote: 像我最近在壓的東西，像光通，光通就暴漲嘛，像是不管這個 LUMENTAN, COHERENT，或是上游的 AXTI，這個都帶給我很好的報酬，衛星也賺錢。
recommendations.speaker: 謝孟恭

recommendations.rationale: Host recounts that many industry insiders went all-in on AAOI but ended up losing money due to extreme volatility; cited as a cautionary example of a stock that washed out holders despite strong conviction.
recommendations.evidence_quote: 同時又讓我想到另外一隻標的，AAOI，這也是超多人喜歡的標的，就臺灣很多人在搞。AOI 之前，你去看一下他怎麼洗的，那你根本不可能抱住啊，那個我們身邊超多產業圈的人士壓爆，你知道為什麼嗎？因為他們還會在林口辦場次，所以我們身邊超多人滿倉這個，然後全部被搞到賠爆。
recommendations.speaker: 謝孟恭

recommendations.rationale: Host does not see a compelling story for UMC given China's massive mature-node capacity expansion; cannot identify a reason why mature-node supply would tighten enough to drive the stock. Prefers Vanguard International Semiconductor if one must play the mature-node theme.
recommendations.evidence_quote: 那以聯電來講，就是我去看他展望，我就會覺得說我不知道你要壓住他什麼樣的故事。就是說成熟製程要突然間大缺嘛，可是中國這邊開這麼多成熟製程，所以我就不知道你買這個是幹嘛。
recommendations.speaker: 謝孟恭

recommendations.company_name: 世界先進積體電路 (Vanguard International Semiconductor)
recommendations.rationale: If one wants exposure to the mature-node foundry segment, host prefers Vanguard over UMC because it can benefit from capacity releases by TSMC.
recommendations.evidence_quote: 可是如果你今天跑去買世界銜金，跑去買 Vanguard 的話，我就會覺得還算合理啦，因為可能他可以喫到臺積電所釋出的一些東西。所以如果真的要去買成熟製程的話，我自己去選啦，這兩個我可能也會去選世界銜金之類的。
recommendations.speaker: 謝孟恭

recommendations.rationale: Host mentions that GG大 (a friend who is often a contrarian signal) bought Micron; host thinks Micron should hold up fine, unlike previous times GG大's buys turned into negative catalysts for Meta and Google.
recommendations.evidence_quote: 他最新的嘗試是他買了 SNDK 跟美光啦，那 SNDK 因為我手上沒有，我是不在意啦，那美光的話，我覺得他會輸啦，我覺得他應該是沒有辦法把我打下去，雖然我上次這樣講的時候，最後面是被砸下去。
recommendations.speaker: 謝孟恭
